message:
Running command: DESIGN_ROOT="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
PROJECT_ROOT="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526"

echo "=== Design root structure ==="
find "$DESIGN_ROOT" -not -path '*/\.*' | sort | head -80

echo ""
echo "=== Key artifacts validation ==="
check() { [ -e "$1" ] && echo "  PASS: $1" || echo "  FAIL: $1"; }
check "$DESIGN_ROOT"
check "$DESIGN_ROOT/config/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_padframe.yaml"
check "$DESIGN_ROOT/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.v"
check "$DESIGN_ROOT/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v"
check "$DESIGN_ROOT/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_chip.v"
check "$DESIGN_ROOT/verilog/rtl/padframe.v"
check "$DESIGN_ROOT/verilog/rtl/core.v"
check "$DESIGN_ROOT/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/config.json"
check "$DESIGN_ROOT/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/pdn_cfg.tcl"
check "$DESIGN_ROOT/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/macro.cfg"
check "$DESIGN_ROOT/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.sdc"
check "$DESIGN_ROOT/reports"
check "$DESIGN_ROOT/filelists"
check "$DESIGN_ROOT/gds"
check "$DESIGN_ROOT/def/core.def"
check "$DESIGN_ROOT/def/padframe.def"
